name: Dynamics 365 Quality Management
description: AI-powered quality evaluation agent outputs across 100% of interactions: quality scores, process adherence rates, script compliance, knowledge base usage, and coached improvement tracking.

name: Dynamics 365 Sentiment Analysis
description: Real-time and historical sentiment scoring, keyword extraction, positive/negative sentiment ratios, and member emotion trend analysis across all contact center channels.

name: Dynamics 365 Process Adherence
description: Step-by-step call flow compliance monitoring: tracks which agents complete required process steps, detects BSA/AML and regulatory verification gaps, and flags script deviation patterns.

name: CRM (Member Records)
description: Member identity records, account history, complaint logs, and interaction history. Used to cross-reference compliance gaps, correlate repeat contacts, and validate remediation completeness.

name: IT Incident Management
description: IT incident logs and system health events. Cross-referenced with quality signals to identify technology-driven quality issues — like the digital banking sync problem driving the bill pay repeat contact spike.

name: Customer Voice / Survey Platform
description: Post-call survey results, CSAT scores, NPS by queue, and qualitative member feedback. Correlated with Dynamics 365 sentiment to validate AI scoring accuracy and identify systemic experience gaps.

name: Microsoft Fabric
description: Tenant-specific unified data analytics platform fed by CCAS. Hosts the historical data lake, Power BI foundation, and AI/ML model registry. Radiant intelligence layer queries Fabric for enriched cross-source correlation.

name: Variant WFM / Call Recording
description: Workforce management schedules, force-to-load ratios, agent shift state, call recording metadata, and call reason codes (first/second reason). Powers correlation between agent-side telemetry and quality outcomes.

name: Voice Bio System
description: Voice authentication enrollment, biometric match confidence, fraud detection flags. Feeds the agent authentication-mode indicator and fallback verification triggers when PinDrop degrades.

name: PinDrop
description: Call authentication scoring, spoofing detection, ANI reputation, carrier intelligence, geo-risk signals. Critical for identifying security posture changes during SIP path degradation.

name: Carrier Intelligence
description: SIP path health, carrier status feeds, fiber/circuit incident reports, and estimated recovery timelines. Enables root-cause identification for infrastructure-driven service degradation.

name: Dynamics 365 IVR / Self-Service
description: Real-time intent capture, self-service completion rates by intent, containment metrics, transfer-out reason codes. Feeds top-intent indicators across all dashboard tiers and powers the IVR template hot-swap path.
